name: ConsentBanner

parameters.name: Categories
parameters.description: Consent buckets to expose in the preferences dialog. Omit `Required: true` ones if your site doesn't use strictly-necessary cookies.

parameters.name: PrivacyPolicyUrl
parameters.description: URL to your privacy policy page. If null, the link is hidden.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.default: "We use a minimal set of cookies to run the site and optionally measure anonymous usage to improve it. You choose what's on."

parameters.name: PreferencesDescription
parameters.default: "Pick which categories you're okay with. You can change this later."

mdSummary:
# ConsentBanner

Consent Banner component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/consent-banner

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ConsentBanner | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ConsentBanner | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ConsentBanner | Categories | `IReadOnlyList<Lumeo.Services.ConsentCategory>` | `DefaultCategories` | Consent buckets to expose in the preferences dialog. Omit `Required: true` ones if your site doesn't use strictly-necessary cookies. |
| ConsentBanner | PrivacyPolicyUrl | `string?` | `` | URL to your privacy policy page. If null, the link is hidden. |
| ConsentBanner | Title | `string` | `"Cookies & consent"` |  |
| ConsentBanner | Description | `string` | `"We use a minimal set of cookies to run the site and optionally measure anonymous usage to improve it. You choose what's on."` |  |
| ConsentBanner | PrivacyPolicyLabel | `string` | `"Read the privacy policy"` |  |
| ConsentBanner | AcceptLabel | `string` | `"Accept all"` |  |
| ConsentBanner | RejectLabel | `string` | `"Reject optional"` |  |
| ConsentBanner | CustomizeLabel | `string` | `"Customize"` |  |
| ConsentBanner | PreferencesTitle | `string` | `"Consent preferences"` |  |
| ConsentBanner | PreferencesDescription | `string` | `"Pick which categories you're okay with. You can change this later."` |  |
| ConsentBanner | RequiredBadge | `string` | `"Required"` |  |
| ConsentBanner | CancelLabel | `string` | `"Cancel"` |  |
| ConsentBanner | SaveLabel | `string` | `"Save preferences"` |  |
| ConsentBanner | AnimationClass | `string` | `"animate-slide-in-from-bottom"` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ConsentService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandlePrefKeyDown handles Escape in ConsentBanner.razor

## Example
```razor
<ConsentBanner />
```
